tenant.settings.profile.title: Organization Profile
tenant.settings.profile.subtitle: Manage company identity, contact channels, and the primary address used across your workspace.
tenant.settings.branding.title: Branding
tenant.settings.branding.subtitle: Upload per-tenant logos and favicon with stable slot names, explicit fallback behavior, and shell-ready previews.
tenant.settings.branding.guidance.logo_l: Use this logo on dark sidebar and dark shell surfaces.
tenant.settings.branding.guidance.logo_d: Use this logo on light topbar and light content surfaces.
tenant.settings.branding.guidance.logo_i: Use a simplified square mark for compact sidebar and mobile shell states.
tenant.settings.branding.guidance.favico: Recommended minimum 32x32 source for browser tabs and bookmarks.
tenant.settings.branding.preview.title: Shell Preview
tenant.settings.branding.preview.expande: Expanded sidebar uses the tenant light logo on dark sidebar variants.
tenant.settings.branding.preview.compact: Minimized shell and mobile compact states use the icon mark.
tenant.settings.branding.preview.browser: Favicon is injected per active tenant and falls back to the global app icon when empty.
tenant.settings.branding.storage_notice: Branding files are stored per tenant under a dedicated public storage directory and overwrite the same stable slot names each time you upload a replacement.
tenant.settings.localization.title: Localization
tenant.settings.localization.subtitle: Set the default language, timezone, currency, and regional defaults for this workspace.
tenant.settings.billing.title: Billing Profile
tenant.settings.billing.subtitle: Keep legal, tax, and billing contact details accurate for invoices, procurement, and compliance workflows.
tenant.settings.status.reset.logo_light: Logo light has been reset to the global fallback.
tenant.settings.status.reset.logo_dark: Logo dark has been reset to the global fallback.
tenant.settings.status.reset.logo_icon: Logo icon has been reset to the global fallback.
tenant.settings.status.reset.favicon: Favicon has been reset to the global fallback.
tenant.settings.errors.access_denied: You do not have permission to view tenant settings.
tenant.settings.errors.profile_manage_de: You do not have permission to update the organization profile.
tenant.settings.errors.branding_manage_d: You do not have permission to manage branding assets.
tenant.settings.errors.localization_mana: You do not have permission to update localization defaults.
tenant.settings.errors.billing_manage_de: You do not have permission to update the billing profile.
